name: Scalapay European BNPL API
what_it_does: Scalapay European BNPL REST API for merchants to offer zero-interest installment payments (3-4 installments) to European consumers across Italy, France, Germany, Spain, Portugal, Finland, and Belgium through Scalapay's mobile-first buy-now-pay-later platform for e-commerce, in-store, and marketplace integration. Enables AI agents to manage Scalapay checkout order creation for Europe BNPL payment automation, handle consumer redirect for Scalapay installment authorization automation, access payment capture and settlement for BNPL merchant fulfillment automation, retrieve payment status confirmation for European transaction automation, manage refund and cancellation for BNPL order management automation, handle webhook notification for Scalapay payment event automation, access merchant reporting for European BNPL analytics automation, retrieve order and transaction history for reconciliation automation, manage merchant portal integration for BNPL program management automation, and integrate Scalapay with Shopify, Magento, WooCommerce, and European e-commerce platforms for end-to-end European BNPL automation.
use_cases: Offering 3-installment BNPL to European shoppers from checkout agents
Capturing Scalapay authorization from European merchant fulfillment agents
Processing BNPL refunds from European order management agents
Confirming Scalapay payment events from European transaction agents
not_for: Non-European markets (Scalapay focuses on Italy, France, Germany, Spain, and nearby EU)
High-ticket BNPL (Scalapay optimized for fashion/lifestyle; Klarna for higher-ticket)
B2B BNPL (Scalapay is B2C consumer installment focused)
best_when: A European e-commerce merchant (particularly fashion, lifestyle, or beauty) wanting AI agents to automate Scalapay BNPL checkout offering, authorization capture, and payment management for European consumer installment payments.
avoid_when: CONSUMER REDIRECT TO SCALAPAY REQUIRED: Scalapay checkout redirects consumer to Scalapay app or web for installment authorization; automated checkout must redirect consumer; automated server-side authorization without consumer redirect creates unsupported flow. MERCHANT MUST CAPTURE BEFORE SHIPPING: Scalapay uses pre-authorization then capture model; automated fulfillment must capture payment before shipping; automated ship-before-capture creates merchant bears risk if capture fails post-shipment. REFUND MUST NOT EXCEED ORIGINAL ORDER: Scalapay refund must not exceed original captured amount; automated refund must validate against original amount; automated excess refund creates refund exceeds payment error. ORDER EXPIRY IF NOT CAPTURED: Scalapay pre-authorized orders expire if not captured within merchant-configured timeframe; automated order management must capture promptly; automated delayed capture creates order expiry and payment not received.

auth.notes: Scalapay uses API key (Bearer token) for authentication. REST API with JSON. Milan, Italy HQ. Founded 2019 by Simone Mancini and Johnny Mitrev. Backed by Tiger Global, Baleen Capital ($155M raised). Products: 3-pay BNPL, in-store BNPL, Shopify app, WooCommerce plugin. SDKs: PHP, Node.js, Python. GDPR. Banca d'Italia regulated. Operates in 8 European markets. Fashion-focused BNPL. Competes with Klarna for EU BNPL.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — merchant registration required
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant pays 3-5% per transaction; consumer pays zero interest; volume discounts
pricing.notes: Milan IT. Tiger Global backed. Merchant-side fee, zero consumer interest. Banca d'Italia regulated.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order and capture APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: CREATE-THEN-CAPTURE TWO-STEP: Scalapay checkout creates order (gets redirect URL) then requires capture after consumer completes; automated checkout must follow create → redirect → capture flow; automated immediate post-create capture creates capture before consumer authorization

SUCCESS AND CANCEL URLS REQUIRED: Scalapay order creation requires successUrl and cancelUrl; automated integration must provide both URLs; automated missing URL parameter creates order creation validation failure

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Scalapay webhooks include signature header; automated webhook processing must verify signature; automated unverified webhook acceptance creates spoofed payment event vulnerability

CONSUMER COUNTRY DETERMINES AVAILABILITY: Scalapay availability depends on consumer billing country; automated checkout must verify Scalapay availability for consumer's country; automated display of Scalapay for non-supported country creates payment option that fails at Scalapay redirect

MERCHANT CURRENCY MUST MATCH MARKET: Scalapay processes in local currency per market (EUR for most EU); automated payment amount must be in correct currency; automated USD or GBP amount for EU markets creates currency not supported error
agent_readiness.security_notes: European BNPL. Banca d'Italia, GDPR, PSD2. API key. EU. Consumer BNPL and installment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: EU BNPL. Banca d'Italia. API key. EU. Consumer installment data.
